name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new workflow, capability, or UX improvement
title: "[Feature] "

---

## Problem

What DM workflow or pain point are you trying to improve?

## Proposed Idea

Describe the feature you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the value during campaign prep or live play.

## Suggested UI or Behavior

Describe how it should feel or work.

## Extra Context

References, screenshots, sketches, or examples.
